zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston是Preston的女兒，於1398年出生在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓。她於1419年與Nicholas Singleton of Broughton在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1450年在英國藍卡爾享年53歲。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston was born in 1398, in Preston, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Preston. She married Nicholas Singleton of Broughton in 1419, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1450, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston est née en 1398, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Preston. Elle a épousé Nicholas Singleton of Broughton en 1419, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1450, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston wurde 1398 in Preston, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Preston geboren. Sie hat 1419 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Singleton of Broughton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1450 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston è nata il nel 1398 nel Preston, Lancashire, England come figlia di Preston. Lei sposato Nicholas Singleton of Broughton nel 1419, nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1450, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Prestonは1398年にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでPrestonの娘として生まれた。1419年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでNicholas Singleton of Broughtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1450年にイギリスランカシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston(은)는 1398년 영국 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Preston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Nicholas Singleton of Broughton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1450년 영국 랭카실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.
